title: Sports Injury 运动受伤
scene: Mike踢球时扭伤了脚去看医生。

lines.en: Doctor, I hurt my foot during a soccer game.
lines.zh: 医生，我踢足球时脚受伤了。

lines.en: I was running and I twisted my ankle.
lines.zh: 我在跑步时扭到了脚踝。

lines.en: Let me see. Can you stand on it?
lines.zh: 让我看看。你能站上去吗？

lines.en: It hurts too much. I cannot put any weight on it.
It does not look broken. But it is badly swollen.
lines.zh: 看起来没有骨折。但是肿得很厉害。

lines.en: Put some ice on it and rest your foot.
How long until I can play soccer again?
About two weeks. Do not rush it.
